description_long: This object consists of a rectangular Marlboro cigarette box with a flip-top lid, partially open to reveal several cigarettes inside. The box is predominantly white with a red top and features the Marlboro logo, gold crest, and the text '20 CLASS A CIGARETTES' at the bottom. The cigarettes inside are cylindrical, with white paper bodies and tan filters speckled with white dots. One cigarette is shown outside the box, standing upright, displaying its full length and the brand name partially visible on the paper. The box appears to be made of thin cardboard, while the cigarettes are composed of paper, tobacco, and a filter. The overall appearance is clean, with no visible burn marks or ash, indicating the cigarettes are unused.
description: A Marlboro-branded cigarette box with a red and white design, open to reveal several unlit cigarettes with tan filters. One cigarette stands outside the box, showing its full length and branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open Marlboro box with visible cigarettes inside and one cigarette standing upright beside it.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open flip-top lid and the side profile of the box, with cigarettes partially visible inside.
description_view_2: Rear view of the box with the Marlboro logo upside down on the lid and a single cigarette standing upright to the right.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the open lid and the side of the box, with a cigarette standing close to the box.
attribute_brand_logo: The box displays the Marlboro logo in bold black letters, a gold crest with 'PM', and the text '20 CLASS A CIGARETTES' at the bottom.
